The Forever Purge (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $44,539,245Details
International Box Office $32,411,280
Worldwide Box Office $76,950,525
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,544,738
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,149,730
Total $3,694,468
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Adela and her husband Juan live in Texas, where Juan is working as a ranch hand for the wealthy Tucker family. Juan impresses the Tucker patriarch, Caleb, but that fuels the jealous anger of Caleb’s son, Dylan. On the morning after The Purge, a masked gang of killers attacks the Tucker family—including Dylan’s wife, and his sister, forcing both families to band together and fight back as the country spirals into chaos and the United States begins to disintegrate around them.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$12,551,220 (28.2% of total gross)
Legs:3.55 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:57.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$18,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,051 opening theaters/3,058 max. theaters, 4.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $52,378,497

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 2nd, 2021 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: July 1st, 2021 (Wide) (Mexico)
July 1st, 2021 (Wide) (Netherlands)
July 1st, 2021 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
July 2nd, 2021 (Wide) (Sweden)
July 2nd, 2021 (Wide) (Slovenia)
Video Release: July 23rd, 2021 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong/bloody violence, and language throughout.
(Rating bulletin 2674 (cert #53158), 3/31/2021)
Running Time: 103 minutes
Franchise: The Purge
Plot point: Political
Subgenre: Action Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Blumhouse, Platinum Dunes, Man in a Tree Productions, Perfect World Pictures, Universal Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Adela and her husband Juan live in Texas, where Juan is working as a ranch hand for the wealthy Tucker family. Juan impresses the Tucker patriarch, Caleb, but that fuels the jealous anger of Caleb’s son, Dylan. On the morning after The Purge, a masked gang of killers attacks the Tucker family—including Dylan’s wife, and his sister, forcing both families to band together and fight back as the country spirals into chaos and the United States begins to disintegrate around them.
